items.title: Visa to Announce Fiscal Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results on October 28, 2025
items.description: SAN FRANCISCO, October 07, 2025--Visa (NYSE: V) will report its fiscal fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, October 28, 2025. After market close, Visa will furnish the results with the Securities and Exchange Commission and post them, along with accompanying financial information, on the Visa Investor Relations website. Visa will issue a news wire alert when the earnings materials are publicly available, including a link to those documents.

items.title: sFOX Strengthens Team with Key Hires from the Payments, Crypto and Institutional Finance Industries, Appointing Fintech Veteran Mark Britto as Advisor
items.description: sFOX, the leading crypto infrastructure company, announced the expansion of its leadership team with three key executive appointments and the addition of fintech pioneer Mark Britto as a strategic advisor.

items.description: The stock has produced a total return of nearly 14,000% since 2006.

items.title: Will Visa's Partnership With Pool Spark a Shared Finance Revolution?
items.description: V's new partnership with Pool and First Internet Bank introduces a shared account model that could redefine collaborative finance.

items.title: Visa’s Stablecoin Push: How Recent Digital Asset Moves Shape the Company’s Valuation
items.description: Visa (NYSE:V) has been making headlines with its accelerated rollout of stablecoin-based cross-border payment solutions. The company’s recent pilot programs and integration of digital assets are sparking interest among investors who are looking for the next phase in payments innovation. See our latest analysis for Visa. It’s been an active stretch for Visa, with new product launches, board changes, and partnerships highlighting its momentum in payments innovation.
